titleStmt.title: SII 34.9: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 9. Tirumaṇañjēri, Mayiladuturai Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the west wall of the central shrine in the Udvāhanāthasvāmin temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājarāja Rājakēsarivarman (Rājarāja I), 6th year = A.D. 991.

Registers that at the command of Uḍaiyapirāṭtiyār (Queen Dowager), the mother of Uttama-chōḻadēva, Ārūraṉ Kambaṉ alias Tirukkaṟṟaḷi-Pichchaṉ of Tirumaṇañjēri arranged for offering sandal paste and food and for lamps using the income of an amount of 16 kaḻañju accrued through the pīḍiligai-vāri (offerings of the devotees placed on the pulpit in front of the deity) gifts, both in gold and rice, in the temple of Mahādēva at Tirumaṇañjēri a brahmadēya of Kaḍalaṅguḍi in Kuṟukkai-nāḍu on the northern bank.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīkOrājarāja kEsari vaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu 6 vatu vaṭakaraik kuṟukkai nāṭṭu prahmadeyam kaṭala
ṅkuṭippāl tirumaṇañcēri mahādevaruṭaiya pīṭilikaivāri śrīuttama cōḻar devar tiruvayiṟuvāytta U
ṭaiya pirāṭṭiyār Aruḷiñceyya Āruraṉ kampanākiya tirumaṇañcērit tirukkaṟṟaḷip piccanēṉ nibandha
ñ cēta paricāvatu Ittēvarkku mikutik kuṟaimai Uḷḷaṭaṅka Orāṭṭai nāḷāl vaṉta poṉ pa
ṉnirukaḻaiñcum tiruvamitarici Ōrāṭṭai nāḷāl vaṉta mikutikkuṟaimai Uḷḷaṭaṅka Ariciyāl vanta
poṉ nālkkaḻaiñcumāka Ippoṉ patiṉaṟu kaḻaiñcum Uṭaiyārkku Orunāḷaikku pōtu nāḻic cantaṉakkuḻampāka muṉnāḻic cantaṉak ku
ḻampuk kāvatākavum vantavariciyilē cantaṉattukkup pōkki nāḻi Arici Uccam pōtaikku Aṉṉa palikkāvatākavum nel vantaṉa mikutikkuṟaimai
Uḷḷaṭaṅka Āṭṭai viṭṭam Iraṇṭu kācāy Ikkāciraṇṭum paricaṭṭattukku Oru kācum tirunamanikaiyum vitāṉamum mēkkaṭṭiyum Uttiriyamum jalapavittirattukkum
Oru kācāvatākavum vanta tiruviḷakkeṇṇai koṇṭu mikutik kuṟaimai Uḷḷaṭaṅka nicatamuḻāk keṇṇaiyāka Ivveṇṇai koṇṭu ciṟukālaic canti Añcum Uccam pō
tai canti Añcum Irāppatiṉālum viḷakkerivippatākavum Ipparicu nivantañ ceytēṉ Āruraṉ kampanākiya tirumaṇañcēri tirukkaṟṟaḷip piccanēṉ Ivai paṉmā
heśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 34.9 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
